support.title: Nkwado
support.description: Ọ bụrụ na ị nwere nsogbu ọ bụla ma ọ bụ ajụjụ gbasara akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù, ị nwere ike ịkpọtụrụ onye nrụpụta:
support.rightsDescription: Ị nwere ike ịrịọ nhichapụ ma ọ bụ mbupụ nke data onwe gị n'oge ọ bụla dịka ikike gị (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA ma ọ bụ POPIA).
support.rightsHint: A ga-emepe onye ahịa email gị na ndebiri eburula ụzọ kọwaa. Ị nwekwara ike idegara adriancl2001@gmail.com.
support.ccpaText: Wedingo anaghị ere data onwe. A na-eji data anakọtara naanị maka njikwa akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù. Ọ bụrụ na ị bụ onye bi na California, ị nwere ikike ịrịọ nhichapụ nke data gị na ịghara ịkpa ókè maka iji ikike gị.
support.appDescription: Ngwa weebụ maka njikwa akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù agbamakwụkwọ.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. Ikike niile echekwabara.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Ndewo,

M na-arịọ nhichapụ nke data onwe m metụtara akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù a:

Aha onye ọbịa:
Token akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù (ọ bụrụ na ị maara ya):

Iji ikike nhichapụ (GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Daalụ.
support.exportEmailBody:
Ndewo,

M na-arịọ mbupụ nke data onwe m metụtara akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù a:

Aha onye ọbịa:
Token akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù (ọ bụrụ na ị maara ya):

Iji ikike mbugharị (GDPR Art. 20).

Daalụ.

cookie.title: Nkwenye kuki
cookie.text: Wedingo na-eji nchekwa mpaghara dị mkpa maka ịrụ ọrụ akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù (ịchekwa oge ọrụ gị na mmasị gị). Anyị anaghị eji kuki ndị ọzọ ma ọ bụ ihe nsochi.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Onye na-ahụ maka nhazi data: Adrián Carrasco López. Kọntaktị: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Ebumnuche: njikwa akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù agbamakwụkwọ, nkwenye ọbịbịa na nkwukọrịta mmemme.

Ndabere iwu: nkwenye nke onye metụtara (Art. 6.1.a GDPR). A na-ahazi data ahụike (ihe nfụkasị nri na enweghị ndidi) site na nkwenye doro anya (Art. 9.2.a GDPR) iji gbanwee nri emume.

Data anakọtara: aha, mmasị nri (ihe nfụkasị na enweghị ndidi), onyonyo ebulitere n'afọ ofufo, ozi ụlọ akụ ma ọ bụrụ na enyere ya n'afọ ofufo.

Ndị nnata: Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) nke dị na US. Google edebanyela aha na Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) nke European Commission kwadoro (Mkpebi Mmezu 2021/914) ma nwee Data Processing Agreement (DPA) dịka Art. 28 GDPR. Ọzọkwa, Google na-agbaso Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US na Switzerland-US.

Mbugharị mba ụwa: a na-echekwa data na sava Google Cloud na mpaghara eur3 (Europe, Frankfurt). Mgbe ọ dị mkpa ibufe data na US, a na-echebe mbufe ahụ site na SCC na asambodo DPF nke Google.

Oge nchekwa: a na-echekwa data ndị ọbịa ruo ọnwa 12 mgbe ụbọchị mmemme gasịrị. Mgbe oge ahụ gasịrị, a ga-ehichapụ ya na-akpaghị aka. A na-echekwa data nhazi onye okike ma ọ bụrụhaala na akaụntụ ahụ na-arụ ọrụ.

Ikike: ị nwere ike iji ikike gị nke ịnweta, imezi, nhichapụ, mmachi, mbugharị na mmegide site na idegara adriancl2001@gmail.com. Ndị ọbịa nwere ike ịrịọ nhichapụ nke data ha site n'igosi aha ha na akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù ha. Anyị ga-aza arịrịọ gị n'ime ụbọchị 30 kacha.

Ikike ịwepụ nkwenye: ị nwere ike ịwepụ nkwenye gị n'oge ọ bụla, maka mmetụta n'ọdịnihu, site na ọwa ndị egosiri n'elu. Mwepụ ahụ anaghị emetụta izi ezi nke nhazi gara aga.

Ikike ịgara ndị nlekọta akwụkwọ mkpesa: n'okpuru GDPR, ị nwere ikike ịgara ndị nchekwa data na ikike gị akwụkwọ mkpesa. Na Spain: AEPD (www.aepd.es).
legal.termsText:
Iji Wedingo pụtara ịnakwere usoro ndị a. Wedingo bụ ikpo okwu maka ịmepụta na ijikwa akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù agbamakwụkwọ.

Onye ọrụ kwetere ịghara iji ikpo okwu ahụ maka ebumnuche iwu na-akwadoghị ma ọ bụ izipu ọdịnaya mkparị.

Wedingo enweghị ọrụ maka ọdịnaya ndị ọrụ mepụtara ma ọ bụ maka ojiji ndị ọbịa na-eji data onwe ha.

Anyị nwere ikike ịgbanwe usoro ndị a. A ga-amara mgbanwe site na ikpo okwu.

Maka ndị bi na California: ọ bụrụ na esemokwu dị n'etiti usoro ndị a na CCPA, ikike ndị CCPA nyere ga-aka.
legal.legalText:
N'ịgbaso Nkeji 10 nke Iwu 34/2002, nke 11 Julaị, gbasara Ọrụ Ọha Mgbasa Ozi na Azụmaahịa Eletrọnịkị (LSSI-CE), a na-amara:

Onye ọrụ: Adrián Carrasco López
Email: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Ebumnuche weebụsaịtị: ikpo okwu akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù agbamakwụkwọ nkeonwe.

Weebụsaịtị a na-eji Firebase (Google LLC) dị ka akụrụngwa nnabata na nchekwa, ya na sava dị na European Union.

compliance.title: Ndebanye aha nke ọrụ nhazi (Art. 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: Emelitere: Julaị 2026. Ndebanye aha a na-edekọ ọrụ nhazi data onwe na Wedingo.
compliance.row1Data: Aha ndị na-alụ, ụbọchị, ebe, isiokwu, foto, egwu, nri, ngalaba
compliance.row1Purpose: Mepụta na hazie akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù agbamakwụkwọ
compliance.row1Retention: Ọ bụrụhaala na akaụntụ ahụ na-arụ ọrụ
compliance.row2Data: Aha onye ọbịa, ọbịbịa (ee/mba), nhọrọ nri, ihe nfụkasị, data ahụike
compliance.row2Purpose: Jikwaa ndepụta ndị ọbịa na nri
compliance.row3Purpose: Ụlọ ngosi foto na akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù
compliance.row4Data: Token oge ọrụ, aha njirimara admin
compliance.row5Data: Omume superadmin, token eji, akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù ehichapụrụ
compliance.internationalText: A na-echekwa data na sava Google Cloud na mpaghara eur3 (Frankfurt, Germany). Google LLC (US) na-arụ ọrụ dị ka onye nhazi data n'okpuru DPA dịka Art. 28 GDPR. A na-echebe mbugharị na US site na:
compliance.dpf: Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US na Switzerland-US
compliance.measureEncryption: Nzochi AES-256-GCM nke onyonyo na data nzuzo (PBKDF2)
compliance.measureTls: Njikọ HTTPS (TLS 1.3) na ikpo okwu niile
compliance.measureFirestore: Iwu nchekwa Firestore (njikwa ịbanye dabere na oge ọrụ)
compliance.measureStorage: Nchekwa mpaghara kacha nta na naanị site na nkwenye
compliance.measureRetention: Iwu nchekwa: ọnwa 12 mgbe mmemme gasịrị maka data ndị ọbịa
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Superadmin echekwara site na Firebase Authentication + ụzọ ezoro ezo
